overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a wizarding school, showing students in robes conversing in a grassy courtyard before a gothic castle adorned with red and gold banners. The camera slowly pans across the medieval architecture and character interactions under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with gothic towers and festival banners

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the courtyard to observe the students and castle architecture

group of three students in dark robes talking together

entered.detail: tall stone towers with pointed spires and red and gold vertical banners
stone wall decorated with alternating red and gold vertical banners
string of small triangular flags hanging between the towers
well-maintained green lawn covering the ground
crenellated stone wall with wooden railings on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans across a sunlit castle courtyard where students in wizard robes gather on the grass. Gothic towers rise in the background adorned with red and gold banners and festive bunting, while groups of students converse in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a vibrant wizarding school courtyard that emphasizes the scale of the surrounding gothic architecture. It begins by gliding over the sunlit grass where groups of students in traditional robes are gathered in conversation. As the camera continues its steady movement, the perspective shifts upward to reveal the towering spires of the castle rising against a partly cloudy sky. The scene then expands to showcase the festive atmosphere, highlighting the red and gold banners and bunting that drape across the medieval stone walls.
